Title: POC-001 - Deliver InsightPulseAI Azure POC
Description: Build a live Azure-hosted proof of concept for InsightPulseAI that demonstrates: 1) Odoo as the transactional system of record, 2) Databricks as the intelligence layer, 3) one bounded AI/automation workflow, 4) repeatable deployment through the approved release path, 5) a complete evidence pack for demo, validation, and later startup-benefit re-engagement.
Acceptance Criteria: Live Azure-hosted POC exists; one end-to-end business workflow works; data reaches the intelligence layer; one AI/automation path works; evidence pack exists.

Title: ISSUE-001 - Odoo transactional core POC
Parent Title: POC-001 - Deliver InsightPulseAI Azure POC
Description: Stand up Odoo on Azure and prove one core transactional workflow end to end.
Acceptance Criteria: User can sign in; one transaction is created and persisted; health checks pass.

Title: TASK-001.1 - Deploy Odoo runtime to Azure target environment
Parent Title: ISSUE-001 - Odoo transactional core POC
Description: Deploy the canonical Odoo runtime to the target Azure environment for the POC.
Acceptance Criteria: Odoo runtime is reachable and healthy in Azure.

Title: TASK-001.2 - Verify PostgreSQL connectivity and health
Parent Title: ISSUE-001 - Odoo transactional core POC
Description: Confirm Odoo is connected to PostgreSQL and basic DB health is green.
Acceptance Criteria: DB connection succeeds; health checks return success.

Title: TASK-001.3 - Configure canonical hostname and ingress
Parent Title: ISSUE-001 - Odoo transactional core POC
Description: Bind the POC to the intended hostname and ingress path.
Acceptance Criteria: Hostname resolves correctly; ingress reaches Odoo.

Title: TASK-001.4 - Seed one demo workflow dataset
Parent Title: ISSUE-001 - Odoo transactional core POC
Description: Load the minimum dataset needed to demo one business workflow.
Acceptance Criteria: Demo data exists and is usable in the selected workflow.

Title: TASK-001.5 - Verify login and one transaction flow end to end
Parent Title: ISSUE-001 - Odoo transactional core POC
Description: Execute a login and one complete transaction flow for the POC scenario.
Acceptance Criteria: Login succeeds; transaction completes successfully.

Title: ISSUE-008 - Odoo Projects to Azure Boards sync POC (Odoo authoritative)
Parent Title: POC-001 - Deliver InsightPulseAI Azure POC
Description: Implement a bounded sync between Odoo Projects and Azure Boards for POC purposes. Azure Boards remains planned truth at portfolio/epic level, but synced project/task execution fields are projected from Odoo Projects. Conflict rule: Odoo wins for synced work item fields.
Acceptance Criteria: A bounded sync path exists; mapped Odoo project/task data appears in Azure Boards; conflict handling is documented and enforced; Odoo-origin updates are reflected in Boards; evidence pack exists.

Title: TASK-008.1 - Define sync boundary and authority rules
Parent Title: ISSUE-008 - Odoo Projects to Azure Boards sync POC (Odoo authoritative)
Description: Define exactly which fields sync from Odoo Projects to Azure Boards and which do not. Document conflict resolution and exception handling.
Acceptance Criteria: Field map and authority rules are documented and approved.

Title: TASK-008.2 - Define Odoo to Azure Boards mapping model
Parent Title: ISSUE-008 - Odoo Projects to Azure Boards sync POC (Odoo authoritative)
Description: Map Odoo project/task concepts to Azure Boards work item types and fields for the POC.
Acceptance Criteria: Mapping covers project, task, status, owner, dates, and reference IDs.

Title: TASK-008.3 - Implement one-way projection from Odoo to Azure Boards
Parent Title: ISSUE-008 - Odoo Projects to Azure Boards sync POC (Odoo authoritative)
Description: Build the initial sync so Odoo projects/tasks create or update corresponding Azure Boards items.
Acceptance Criteria: At least one Odoo project and its tasks are projected successfully into Azure Boards.

Title: TASK-008.4 - Enforce conflict rule (Odoo wins)
Parent Title: ISSUE-008 - Odoo Projects to Azure Boards sync POC (Odoo authoritative)
Description: Implement reconciliation logic so that for synced fields, Odoo overrides conflicting Azure Boards values.
Acceptance Criteria: Conflicting test updates resolve back to Odoo values on the next sync.

Title: TASK-008.5 - Add idempotency logging and evidence capture
Parent Title: ISSUE-008 - Odoo Projects to Azure Boards sync POC (Odoo authoritative)
Description: Add execution logging, replay safety, and evidence capture for the sync path.
Acceptance Criteria: Repeated runs do not create duplicates; logs are reviewable; evidence artifacts are stored.

Title: TASK-008.6 - Validate POC with one live project
Parent Title: ISSUE-008 - Odoo Projects to Azure Boards sync POC (Odoo authoritative)
Description: Run the sync on one real or demo Odoo project and verify the Azure Boards representation is accurate enough for demo purposes.
Acceptance Criteria: One project syncs successfully; sample conflict case is demonstrated; POC acceptance evidence exists.

Title: ISSUE-002 - Databricks intelligence path POC
Parent Title: POC-001 - Deliver InsightPulseAI Azure POC
Description: Land Odoo-origin data in the intelligence plane and produce one useful curated output.
Acceptance Criteria: Odoo-origin data lands in bronze; at least one curated gold dataset exists; demo shows source to curated output.

Title: TASK-002.1 - Provision or connect Databricks workspace for POC
Parent Title: ISSUE-002 - Databricks intelligence path POC
Description: Establish the Databricks workspace needed for the POC path.
Acceptance Criteria: Workspace is available and accessible for the POC.

Title: TASK-002.2 - Define bronze landing path for Odoo extract
Parent Title: ISSUE-002 - Databricks intelligence path POC
Description: Implement initial landing of Odoo-origin data into bronze.
Acceptance Criteria: Bronze landing completes with expected source data.

Title: TASK-002.3 - Build one silver normalization flow
Parent Title: ISSUE-002 - Databricks intelligence path POC
Description: Normalize one source dataset into a typed and cleaned silver output.
Acceptance Criteria: Silver dataset exists and passes basic validation.

Title: TASK-002.4 - Build one gold dataset for demo use case
Parent Title: ISSUE-002 - Databricks intelligence path POC
Description: Produce one curated gold dataset that supports the selected POC narrative.
Acceptance Criteria: Gold dataset exists and is demo-ready.

Title: TASK-002.5 - Validate freshness and schema for selected dataset
Parent Title: ISSUE-002 - Databricks intelligence path POC
Description: Confirm the selected curated dataset is fresh enough and structurally stable for the demo.
Acceptance Criteria: Freshness and schema checks pass.

Title: ISSUE-003 - Foundry / AI assistive workflow POC
Parent Title: POC-001 - Deliver InsightPulseAI Azure POC
Description: Implement one bounded AI-assisted scenario against governed business data.
Acceptance Criteria: AI scenario runs successfully; trace/eval evidence exists; no unsafe direct writes to SoR occur.

Title: TASK-003.1 - Define one bounded AI use case
Parent Title: ISSUE-003 - Foundry / AI assistive workflow POC
Description: Select and define one practical bounded AI scenario for the POC.
Acceptance Criteria: Use case is documented and approved for implementation.

Title: TASK-003.2 - Connect approved data and tool surfaces
Parent Title: ISSUE-003 - Foundry / AI assistive workflow POC
Description: Wire the selected AI scenario to approved data and tool boundaries.
Acceptance Criteria: Scenario can access only approved data and tool surfaces.

Title: TASK-003.3 - Implement prompt and tool flow
Parent Title: ISSUE-003 - Foundry / AI assistive workflow POC
Description: Build the prompt/tool orchestration for the selected AI workflow.
Acceptance Criteria: Workflow executes successfully for sample inputs.

Title: TASK-003.4 - Add trace and evaluation capture
Parent Title: ISSUE-003 - Foundry / AI assistive workflow POC
Description: Capture trace and evaluation outputs for the POC workflow.
Acceptance Criteria: Trace and evaluation records exist for test runs.

Title: TASK-003.5 - Validate output quality on sample cases
Parent Title: ISSUE-003 - Foundry / AI assistive workflow POC
Description: Run sample scenarios and verify output quality against expectations.
Acceptance Criteria: Outputs meet the defined baseline quality threshold.

Title: ISSUE-004 - Integration and automation POC
Parent Title: POC-001 - Deliver InsightPulseAI Azure POC
Description: Implement one repeatable integration or automation path across platform components.
Acceptance Criteria: Workflow runs successfully from trigger to completion; failure mode is observable; output is repeatable.

Title: TASK-004.1 - Select one trigger to action workflow
Parent Title: ISSUE-004 - Integration and automation POC
Description: Pick the single integration path to demonstrate in the POC.
Acceptance Criteria: One trigger/action flow is selected and documented.

Title: TASK-004.2 - Implement automation via approved runtime
Parent Title: ISSUE-004 - Integration and automation POC
Description: Build the selected workflow using the approved runtime and boundaries.
Acceptance Criteria: Workflow executes successfully end to end.

Title: TASK-004.3 - Add retry and error handling
Parent Title: ISSUE-004 - Integration and automation POC
Description: Add minimal retry and observable error handling to the workflow.
Acceptance Criteria: Failures are surfaced and retries behave as expected.

Title: TASK-004.4 - Capture logs and evidence
Parent Title: ISSUE-004 - Integration and automation POC
Description: Collect logs and execution evidence for the automation path.
Acceptance Criteria: Logs and evidence are stored and reviewable.

Title: TASK-004.5 - Validate idempotent behavior for POC path
Parent Title: ISSUE-004 - Integration and automation POC
Description: Confirm reruns do not produce unsafe duplicate side effects.
Acceptance Criteria: Idempotency behavior is documented and validated.

Title: ISSUE-005 - Azure runtime and release path POC
Parent Title: POC-001 - Deliver InsightPulseAI Azure POC
Description: Make the POC deployable repeatably through the approved release path.
Acceptance Criteria: Pipeline deploy succeeds in dev; smoke verification passes; release evidence exists.

Title: TASK-005.1 - Finalize Odoo pipeline path for dev deploy
Parent Title: ISSUE-005 - Azure runtime and release path POC
Description: Complete the canonical Odoo dev deployment pipeline path.
Acceptance Criteria: Dev deployment pipeline runs successfully.

Title: TASK-005.2 - Verify self-hosted agent pool usage
Parent Title: ISSUE-005 - Azure runtime and release path POC
Description: Confirm the intended self-hosted agent pool is used for the pipeline.
Acceptance Criteria: Pipeline runs on the expected agent pool.

Title: TASK-005.3 - Wire required secrets and variables
Parent Title: ISSUE-005 - Azure runtime and release path POC
Description: Connect the required variable groups and secrets for the POC path.
Acceptance Criteria: Pipeline can access required secrets and variables securely.

Title: TASK-005.4 - Run deploy and smoke verification
Parent Title: ISSUE-005 - Azure runtime and release path POC
Description: Execute a dev deploy and verify the runtime with smoke checks.
Acceptance Criteria: Deployment succeeds and smoke checks pass.

Title: TASK-005.5 - Capture release evidence artifacts
Parent Title: ISSUE-005 - Azure runtime and release path POC
Description: Store the release evidence needed for review and repeatability.
Acceptance Criteria: Evidence artifacts are captured and linked.

Title: ISSUE-006 - POC evidence pack and demo readiness
Parent Title: POC-001 - Deliver InsightPulseAI Azure POC
Description: Produce the evidence pack and demo narrative needed to explain and defend the POC.
Acceptance Criteria: Evidence pack exists in repo/docs; demo script can be executed by one operator; narrative clearly explains value.

Title: TASK-006.1 - Produce POC architecture diagram
Parent Title: ISSUE-006 - POC evidence pack and demo readiness
Description: Create the architecture diagram for the POC scope.
Acceptance Criteria: Diagram exists and reflects the POC runtime accurately.

Title: TASK-006.2 - Capture runtime screenshots
Parent Title: ISSUE-006 - POC evidence pack and demo readiness
Description: Capture screenshots that prove the POC is live and working.
Acceptance Criteria: Screenshots are stored and reviewable.

Title: TASK-006.3 - Capture Azure resource inventory
Parent Title: ISSUE-006 - POC evidence pack and demo readiness
Description: Collect the Azure resource inventory for the deployed POC.
Acceptance Criteria: Resource inventory is captured and current.

Title: TASK-006.4 - Write one-page demo narrative
Parent Title: ISSUE-006 - POC evidence pack and demo readiness
Description: Write a concise narrative describing the problem, solution, and live POC outcome.
Acceptance Criteria: Narrative exists and is clear enough for stakeholders.

Title: TASK-006.5 - Prepare short demo script
Parent Title: ISSUE-006 - POC evidence pack and demo readiness
Description: Create a short operator-ready demo script for the POC.
Acceptance Criteria: Demo script is executable by one person without guesswork.

Title: ISSUE-007 - Startup benefits and M365 follow-up
Parent Title: POC-001 - Deliver InsightPulseAI Azure POC
Description: Track startup verification and Microsoft 365 redemption as a separate blocker-removal lane that must not block core POC delivery.
Acceptance Criteria: Blockers are documented; no active POC work depends on this issue closing first.

Title: TASK-007.1 - Record current startup verification failure state
Parent Title: ISSUE-007 - Startup benefits and M365 follow-up
Description: Document the current startup verification failure state and evidence.
Acceptance Criteria: Failure state is recorded with supporting evidence.

Title: TASK-007.2 - Record current M365 redemption blocker state
Parent Title: ISSUE-007 - Startup benefits and M365 follow-up
Description: Document the current Microsoft 365 redemption blocker and tenant state.
Acceptance Criteria: Redemption blocker state is recorded clearly.

Title: TASK-007.3 - Preserve tenant and admin evidence
Parent Title: ISSUE-007 - Startup benefits and M365 follow-up
Description: Capture the current tenant, admin, and licensing evidence for later follow-up.
Acceptance Criteria: Tenant/admin evidence is preserved and accessible.

Title: TASK-007.4 - Draft support or appeal packet
Parent Title: ISSUE-007 - Startup benefits and M365 follow-up
Description: Prepare the support ticket or appeal packet needed for later re-engagement.
Acceptance Criteria: Support packet exists and is ready to send.

Title: TASK-007.5 - Revisit after POC evidence pack is complete
Parent Title: ISSUE-007 - Startup benefits and M365 follow-up
Description: Re-open this lane only after the core POC evidence pack is done.
Acceptance Criteria: Follow-up timing is explicitly deferred until POC completion.
